dr_section_ref: DR §1 — Indonesian discourse particles (mah on inclusive kita)
notes: Concessive mah on 'kita' (inclusive 'we' — includes the listener). 'Harus sabar' = 'must be patient'. The English 'As for us, we have to be patient' preserves both the topicalization and the inclusive-we semantics. VERIFY WITH GIRLFRIEND: 'We just have to be patient' is less topicalized but more natural English.
